version_description: The tab is on 2nd fret while other versions are with no capo.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: Born In The USA
Artist: Bruce Springsteen

[Intro]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Born down in a dead man's town[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
The first kick I took was when I hit the ground[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
End up like a dog that's been beat too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Till you spend half your life just covering up[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., I was born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
I was born in the U.S.A., born in the U.S.A. now[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Got in a little hometown jam[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
So they put a rifle in my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Sent me off to a foreign land[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
To go and kill the yellow man[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., I was born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
I was born in the U.S.A., I was born in the U.S.A.[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Come back home to the refinery[/tab]

Hiring man said "Son, if it was up to me"
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Went down to see my V.A. man[/tab]

He said "Son, don't you understand"

[Break]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I had a brother at Khe Sahn[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Fighting off the Viet Cong[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
They're still there, he's all gone[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
He had a woman he loved in Saigon[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                      | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |
I got a picture of him in her arms now[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Down in the shadow of the penitentiary[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Out by the gas fires of the refinery[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
I'm ten years burning down the road[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Nowhere to run, ain't got nowhere to go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., I was born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., I'm a long gone Daddy in the U.S.A. now[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A., I'm a cool rocking Daddy in the U.S.A. now[/tab]

[Outro]
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |
